training.ownership: Only the recorded host or authorized staff may finish a session.
training.endBehavior: The original announcement is updated/replied with ENDED and the result is logged.

tryout.authority: Staff cannot assign a better rank than their configured authority; ordinary tryout staff cannot assign below Stage 3 Low Weak.
tryout.approval: Optional pending approval before role mutation.
tryout.profileRequirement: Target must have verified Roblox identity.

activity: Completed sessions increment host activity and feed quota/recommendation reports.
